hero.headline: Book courts, join meetups, play more pickleball
hero.sub: Reserve nearby courts, find people to play with, and connect rentals, clubs, and ads—all on Piclick.

features.heading: Book · Meet · Rent · Promote
features.sub: Built for players, organizers, and venue operators who want more pickleball with less friction.

booking.title: Court booking
booking.body: Check open indoor and outdoor courts and reserve—from one-off sessions to recurring slots.

community.title: Meetup community
community.body: Create or join open games and club sessions by level, area, and schedule.

venue.title: Venue rental
venue.body: Request courts and facilities for groups, leagues, and events, then align schedules with operators.

ads.title: Clubs & ads
ads.body: Lessons, clubs, gear, and venues can reach pickleball players naturally on Piclick.

cta.heading: Your next rally starts on Piclick
cta.sub: Booking and meetups come first—rentals and ads follow. Create an account to get ready.

1.title: Choose a reading area
1.description: Pick the theme that matches what you want to explore.

2.title: Your question
2.description: Write what is on your mind.

3.title: Draw cards
3.description: After drawing cards, tap View result to see your AI tarot reading.

tarot.questionOptional: You can continue without writing a question.

errors.network: AI reading failed due to a network error. Check your connection and try again.
errors.parse: Could not process the AI response. Please try again shortly.
errors.session: Could not verify your login session.

tarot.nicknameHint: Set a nickname or skip for now.
tarot.readingInFlight: A reading is already in progress. Please wait.
tarot.readingEmpty: The reading came back empty. Please try again.
tarot.readingGenericError: Something went wrong during the reading.
tarot.copyFailed: Could not copy. Check browser permissions.

auth.forgotHint: We'll send a password reset link to your email.

errors.fallback: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.emailNotConfirmed: Email not verified. Check your inbox for the verification link.
errors.alreadyRegistered: This email is already registered. Log in or use forgot password.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.rateLimit: Too many requests. Please try again later.
errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.samePassword: New password must differ from the old one.
errors.sessionExpired: Reset link expired. Please request a new one.
errors.configLoadFailed: Could not load sign-in settings. Please try again.
errors.forgotConfigFailed: Could not load password reset settings.
errors.resendConfigFailed: Could not load verification email settings.
errors.resendNeedsEmail: Enter your email to resend verification.

info.verificationSent: Verification email sent. Open the link in your inbox to finish.
info.resetSent: Password reset email sent. Check your inbox.

resetPassword.title: Set new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password.
resetPassword.configLoadFailed: Could not load password reset settings.

pages.topicsDescription: Explore Piclick features: court booking, meetup community, venue rental, and club ads.
pages.guidesDescription: Beginner tips, court booking advice, how to join meetups, and venue or club guides.
pages.disclaimer: Piclick helps you book, meet, and rent for pickleball. Always follow each venue's rules and safety guidelines.

mypage.title: My page
mypage.loginRequired: Please log in from the home page.
mypage.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please log in again.
mypage.subtitle: Manage your profile and nickname.
mypage.disclaimer: Piclick is for pickleball booking, meetups, and venue rental. Follow each venue's rules when you play.

footer.disclaimer: © {year} {name}. Court and facility use follows each operator's rules and safety guidelines. See the Privacy Policy for cookies and Google AdSense.

seo.homeDescription: Book pickleball courts, join meetups, rent venues, and grow your club on Piclick—reserve, play, and host in one place.
seo.topicsMetaDescription: Explore Piclick features: pickleball court booking, meetup community, venue rental, and club ads.
seo.guidesMetaDescription: Beginner tips, court booking advice, how to join meetups, and venue or club guides on Piclick.
